items.title: Cycle Introduces EU Control Plane as Sovereignty Debate Continues
items.summaryShort: Cycle Introduces EU Control Plane as Sovereignty Debate Continues. Cycle recently introduced a separate EU-based control plane, allowing European customers to keep platform management data and telemetry within Europe.

items.title: Cloudflare Details Unified Data Platform Where Billing Workloads Account for 53% of Queries
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Details Unified Data Platform Where Billing Workloads Account for 53% of Queries. Cloudflare details Town Lake, an internal unified data platform, and Skipper, an AI analytics agent unifying access to operational, billing, securi

items.title: Hardwood Promises High-Speed JVM Apache Parquet Processing with Zero Mandatory Dependencies
items.summaryShort: Hardwood Promises High-Speed JVM Apache Parquet Processing with Zero Mandatory Dependencies. Hardwood, the project Gunnar Morling kick-started to improve the handling of Parquet files in Java, reached version 1.

items.title: OpenTelemetry Graduates to CNCF's Highest Maturity Level
items.summaryShort: OpenTelemetry Graduates to CNCF's Highest Maturity Level. The Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) has announced the graduation of OpenTelemetry, elevating the project to the foundation's highest level of maturity and formally recognizi

items.title: Mini book: Agentic AI Architecture
items.summaryShort: Mini book: Agentic AI Architecture. In this eMag, we try to establish agentic AI architecture as a new type of software architecture that will likely dominate the industry for years to come.

items.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
items.summaryShort: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI. Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Goog

items.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
items.summaryShort: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage. As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

items.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
items.summaryShort: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code. Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.
